tasks.result_summary: Added 25 MCP security contract RED tests in server/src/test-runner.ts and confirmed expected RED failure.

Added McpSecurityContract security foundation and hardened credential fail-closed, Origin fail-closed, trusted proxy fail-closed, webhook binding, and token replay denial. Server tests 366 passed, build passed, final prickly review No findings.

Added 13 RED registry/alias contract tests for sessionKey/currentSessionId binding, stale target rejection, includeSelf list/search behavior, alias persistence, broadcast, startup reconcile, and legacy backfill. Expected RED verified: server test-runner exit 1 with 13 missing McpSessionRegistryContract failures.

Implemented MCP session registry and alias contract with stable sessionKey/currentSessionId binding, restart generation tracking, stale target rejection, list/search/set alias behavior, duplicate key repair with stopped-key reservation, and full WorkspaceService search failure metadata preservation. Server tests 385 passed, build passed, final prickly review No findings.

Added 26 RED input gateway contract tests to server/src/test-runner.ts. They fail only because ./services/SessionInputGateway.js is missing, while existing MCP security and registry/alias tests pass before the new RED block. No production implementation files were edited.

Implemented shared SessionInputGateway and routed restore/WebSocket input through it. Hardened replay/screen-repair barrier handling, low-level metadata sanitization, and protected-source submit scope enforcement. Server tests 412 passed, build passed, git diff check passed, final prickly review No findings.

Added 18 RED MCP transport/tool tests for Streamable HTTP tools/list and tools/call, whoami, claim, list/search/set_alias, message.send, update_status, audit/status observability, listener policy, and rebind rollback. Expected RED verified: server test-runner exits 1 because ./services/McpToolService.js is missing; git diff check passed; final review No findings.

Implemented MCP Streamable HTTP tool service and independent loopback MCP listener wiring with claim bootstrap, WorkspaceService session list/search/alias integration, SessionInputGateway-backed message delivery, listener rebind rollback, redacted audit/status, malformed-denial JSON-RPC handling, and replay-state-aware MCP input delivery. Server tests 431 passed, build passed, git diff check passed, final prickly review No findings.

Added 14 RED agent lifecycle tests for dedicated agent profiles, open_agent preallocation, spawn-time MCP config/currentSessionId, manual claim mode, SessionInputGateway command/kickoff, update_status registry refresh, launch compensation, safe close/deleteTab routing, deferred close_self, and close outcome observability. Expected RED verified: server test-runner exits 1 with 14 missing AgentLifecycleService failures; build passed; git diff check passed; final review No findings.

Implemented AgentLifecycleService and MCP tool wiring for agent profiles, open_agent preallocation, spawn-time MCP env/generated-file/manual claim config, SessionInputGateway command/kickoff delivery with readiness gating, update_status registry refresh, token revoke checks, generated-file-only config files, safe close/deleteTab routing, deferred close_self, and cleanup observability. Server tests 449 passed, build passed, git diff check passed, final prickly review No findings.

Added 35 RED webhook/control REST tests covering webhook key create/invoke/list/rotate/revoke, query and header credentials, no-target open_agent, alias resolution, rate limit and denial precedence, UI-auth-only MCP control config and mutation APIs, agent profile validation, sessions/search/reply/close endpoints, one-time secret exposure, redaction, includeSelf default, deferred close_self failure notification, and close confirmation nonce shape. Expected RED verified: server test-runner exits 1 with 35 missing WebhookInvocationService/McpControlService failures; build passed; git diff check passed; final TDD review No findings.
